data.title: New generation of international visitors follows in Edgar Snow's footsteps
data.description: In Zhengzhou, China, on March 29, 2026, it has been reported that a significant number of foreign visitors are retracing the steps of renowned American journalist Edgar Snow who revisited China over sixty years ago to capture the country's evolution. These modern-day travelers are coming to a similar realization as Snow did, reaffirming his observations.
Autozi Internet Technology (Global) Ltd. Receives NASDAQ Notification Regarding Minimum Market Value of Listed Securities

data.title: Landmark ALL-RISE® Trial Results Presented at ACC.26: CathWorks FFRangio Demonstrates Similar Clinical Outcomes to Invasive Wire-based Physiology Assessment
data.description: New findings from a recent clinical trial reveal that the usage of CathWorks FFRangio, derived from angiography, leads to enhanced resource management and reduced procedure duration. The one-year data from the ALL-RISE study has been unveiled in the prestigious New England Journal of Medicine. The results were disclosed in New Orleans on March 29, 2026. This development highlights significant benefits in terms of streamlining resources and saving time in medical procedures.

data.title: Weekend Round-Up: Crypto Exchange Gets Fed Approval, Ethereum Outperforms S&P 500 And More
data.description: This past week in the cryptocurrency world was filled with noteworthy events. One of the standout moments was a crypto exchange, Kraken, making history by being granted unprecedented access to Federal Reserve services. This decision raised concerns from Maxine Waters (D-Calif.) who is seeking more clarity on the matter. This approval allows Kraken direct access to Fedwire, a crucial payment system utilized by numerous U.S. financial institutions. In another interesting development, Ethereum has shown strong performance by outpacing the S&P 500 amidst wartime situations. Additionally, renowned figure Tom Lee has been advocating for the superiority of cryptocurrency over gold, citing various reasons to support his stance. The entire landscape of the crypto market has been abuzz with activity, paving the way for further advancements in the industry.

data.title: Sustainable Living Campaign Launches in L.A.
data.description: A new cross-platform campaign called Sustainable Living has been launched in LA by Mediaplanet with the aim of promoting environmental responsibility and encouraging action for a more sustainable future. The campaign brings together experts, organizations, and advocates to drive this initiative forward. The launch took place in New York on March 29, 2026. This collaborative effort seeks to raise awareness and inspire change on environmental issues.

data.title: CELEBRITY STYLIST AND CULTURAL TASTEMAKER SCOT LOUIE CURATES TREND COLLECTION FOR SHEIN
data.description: An exclusive Spring/Summer '26 collection highlights seven defining fashion trends LOS ANGELES, 29th March 2026 -- SHEIN, the renowned online retailer, collaborates with celebrity stylist Scot Louie to present the latest seasonal trends in fashion and lifestyle. The curated collection aims to showcase the most captivating styles for the season, featuring seven distinct trends carefully selected by Louie. This partnership signifies a fusion of high-end fashion with accessible online retail, providing customers with an opportunity to stay trendy and chic.

data.title: DISNEYLAND PARIS UNVEILS DISNEY ADVENTURE WORLD AND OPENS WORLD OF FROZEN, MARKING A NEW ERA OF IMMERSIVE STORYTELLING
data.description: In France's Marne-la-Vallée, on March 29, 2026, Disneyland Paris marks a significant milestone as it introduces the World of Frozen and reveals the revamped second park now known as Disney Adventure World. This major development signifies a significant shift in the park's offerings, one of the most notable in its history.

data.title: n6 Launches icon16™, Expanding AutoNorm™ Adaptive Amplification to Lower-Throughput NGS Workflows
data.description: AutoNorm™ adaptive amplification technology, which is revolutionizing library preparation at top genomics cores, has launched in a new 16-well format. This version is specifically designed for laboratories handling smaller sequencing batches while maintaining high data quality standards. The technology is now accessible to more labs seeking efficient and reliable solutions. The announcement was made in Pleasanton, California on March 29, 2026.

data.title: The "Artificial Intelligence + Industry" Forum 2026: AI Facilitates Industrial Transformation
data.description: On March 27 in Beijing, during the 2026 Zhongguancun Forum Annual Conference, the "Artificial Intelligence + Industry" Forum took place. This session highlighted the significant focus on the widespread commercial utilization of AI. The event aimed at promoting the development of fresh business models and structures within the industry.

data.title: World Foundation sells $65M worth of WLD tokens at a discount, as the token reaches new lows with more supply incoming.
data.description: The World Foundation has recently sold $65 million worth of WLD tokens at a significantly reduced price due to the token reaching all-time lows. Additionally, there is anticipation of a greater supply of tokens entering the market in the near future.

data.title: Institutions pay Bitcoin custodians for safety, but onchain governance eliminates counterparty risk.
data.description: Businesses are compensating custodians for a false sense of security, despite a shift in the trend towards Bitcoin's onchain governance that eradicates counterparty risk. This innovative approach to finance is gaining traction as institutions realize the inefficiency and potential risks associated with the traditional model. Bitcoin, with its decentralized onchain governance, offers a reliable alternative, appealing to many who are now becoming increasingly aware of the advantages of this system. This transformation is reflected by the notable increase in Bitcoin adoption within the financial sector, with a growing number of institutional investors recognizing the value of this digital asset.

data.title: Chances of Ethereum 'flippening' Bitcoin increase as Polymarket traders raise odds from 17% to over 59% by 2026.
data.description: Traders on Polymarket are expressing a growing concern about ETH potentially dropping from its current position as the second-largest cryptocurrency by market capitalization in 2026. The probability of this happening has sharply increased from 17% to over 59% during this year.
Consumer Tech News (March 23-27): Netflix & Sony Hikes Prices, OpenAI Flags Microsoft Dependency Risk & More

data.title: Goodbaby International 2025 Revenue Reaches Approximately HK$8,659.2 Million
data.description: In the midst of a challenging global environment, CYBEX achieved significant success by breaking its own records for revenue and profit. The company saw a notable 13.0% increase in revenue, reaching around HK$5,047.4 million. This growth was supported by the strong performance of Evenflo within the sector. These achievements highlight CYBEX's ability to gain market share and thrive amidst turbulent conditions.

data.title: Pharos Network and Circle to Bring USDC and CCTP to Upcoming Mainnet, Powering a RealFi Settlement Layer
data.description: Today, in Hong Kong, Pharos Network, a prominent Layer-1 blockchain platform, revealed that the widely-used stablecoin USDC and Circle Cross-Chain Transfer Protocol (CCTP) will be implemented on Pharos Mainnet in The Pacific Ocean. This move aims to enhance stablecoin settlement processes and facilitate smooth cross-chain capital transfer.

data.title: Apple Self Storage Guelph Achieves Zero Carbon Building-Design Certification
data.description: Apple Self Storage in Guelph, Ontario has recently made history by becoming the first self storage facility in the province to receive the prestigious Zero Carbon Building-Design certification from the Canada Green Building Council. This accomplishment marks a significant milestone in the industry, showcasing the facility's commitment to environmental sustainability. This certification reflects the facility's adherence to strict standards aimed at reducing carbon emissions and promoting eco-friendly practices. By achieving this designation, Apple Self Storage has set a notable example for others in the sector.

data.title: DOT Reinforces SAP Gatekeeper Role Amid Rising Industry Risks
data.description: ASAP cautions both employers and employees about the potential risks associated with websites promoting fast, guaranteed, or inexpensive RTD programs. The warning was issued in Baltimore on March 28, 2026. ASAP has raised concerns about fraudulent SAP practices posing a threat to public safety. It has been noted that some employers do not regularly verify a SAP's credentials, heightening the risk of falling victim to such schemes. It is essential for all parties involved to exercise vigilance and scrutinize any programs claiming unusual benefits or low costs.

data.title: Lummis advocates for developer protections in the CLARITY Act, overlooked amid focus on stablecoin yield - crypto lawyer.
data.description: Jake Chervinsky, a lawyer specializing in cryptocurrency, highlighted that current legislation concerning protections for crypto developers has not received much attention due to the significant emphasis on stablecoin yield within the CLARITY Act. The focus on stablecoin yield has diverted attention from key issues related to developer safeguards within the crypto industry.

data.title: P2P.me team regrets betting on own $6M fundraising outcome on Polymarket prediction platform.
data.description: The team at P2P.me has initiated bets on the Polymarket prediction platform regarding whether the project will reach its fundraising target of $6 million.

data.title: Leading Eye Insurance Plans (2026): VSP Individual Vision Plans Recognized for Nationwide Eye Doctor Network by Better Business Advice
data.description: On March 29, 2026, Better Business Advice acknowledged VSP Individual Vision Plans for its top-tier eye insurance offerings, praising its extensive network of eye care providers across the nation and comprehensive coverage including eye exams, eyewear, and lens enhancements. The recognition highlights the company's commitment to providing quality vision care to its customers.
